description: Sofy is very good software for all the companies and developers who working on building mobile apps. It's a effective solution to build mobile application with No-Code Development and Automated Testing Features.
author: Jhanvi K.
pros: This Tool is very easy to use and effective for Automation Process. It offers many features that helps you to building mobile apps with unique features of No Code Development, Application Performance Management, Automated and Performance Testing, etc.
cons: We haven't face any difficulties with the software till now. Sometimes it gives an error while performing automation testing but it's not a major issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Sofy is solving all our basic problems at the moment
description: Overall its a great experience, Sofy is apparently solving all our basic problems at the moment.
author: Rabee T.
pros: Following features are the reasons I liked most about Sofy: 1. Person without code knowledge can automate the test cases 2. Variety of devices to test the compatibility 3. CI test 4. Logs and details about test cases 5. Management of test cases and Templates
cons: 1. Simulator takes too much time in running test cases which sometimes feel lazy
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall experience is good. It is fulfilling our need for device coverage.
author: Bhavan V.
pros: No Code Automation Logs and insights Device Availability Ease of Use
cons: Performance of the Devices Failures while performing no code automation Test Case Import option Converting test cases in to automation suites
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Arjun J.
pros: Sofy is great workflow management tool. It has real time analytics and comes with a drag and drop functionality. I really loved the monitoring and software testing management feature.
cons: Using sofy till date I have not found any type of bug.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Sofy has better automation tools than its competitors on mobile.
author: Philip I.
pros: We were able to test our native and flutter applications on real devices and automate much of out testing for each release with relative ease.
cons: The biggest con was not being able to break up our tests in to smaller reusable parts. but no one else has that feature either.

review_title: Best Device Farm for non Developers
description: Best On-boarding Process that I had ever to experience on my career. Quick response via Teams and transparency about some issues that may impact our work. Reactivity against any issue detected.
author: Feres D.
pros: Ability to pick a large type of Smartphones Android and Ios for all our tests
cons: Software is on continuous improvement, with features that make sens to users. so some of my remarks are taken into account and corrected

description: Automating test cases helped developer and QA teams achieve better performance and results.
author: Jamal K.
pros: Great customer support services that are always available. Sofy saved us time and money by helping us create test cases and automate them. The test suite allowed us to add individual test cases and run them all in one shot.
cons: It would be nice if more devices are added especially when scheduling tests, although Sofy has a feature to rerun the test automatically if a device is not available
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I was evaluating a codeless automation tool for that i picked sofy and TestProject, but i found test project is far better than sofy.
author: Jyesh R.
pros: NA, I was evaluating code less automation tool, i got to know about test project and I found test project is open source. So i picked test project for evaluation.
cons: Its not open source, there are other service providers whi provide same service in free such as TestProject.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall it was good and very easy to use
author: Vidyashree P.
pros: No-code automation and availability of different real time devices for test
cons: No conditional loops available and no scope for exceptional handling scenario
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Surendar V.
pros: Very easy to test and automate on multiple devices
cons: Not a finished product and was in developmental phase
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
